item.title: Took Them to a Military Surplus Store!
item.description: From rugged gear to unexpected finds, a trip to the military surplus store is never ordinary. What treasures and surprises were waiting on the shelves this time?

media:content.media:title: Took Them to a Military Surplus Store!
media:content.media:description: From rugged gear to unexpected finds, a trip to the military surplus store is never ordinary. What treasures and surprises were waiting on the shelves this time?

item.title: Fishing Face‑Off: Kendall Gray Takes the Challenge
item.description: The stakes are set and the lines are cast. Who comes out on top when Kendall Gray faces off in a fishing showdown?

media:content.media:title: Fishing Face‑Off: Kendall Gray Takes the Challenge
media:content.media:description: The stakes are set and the lines are cast. Who comes out on top when Kendall Gray faces off in a fishing showdown?

item.title: What Could Go Wrong?
item.description: Everything seemed simple—until it wasn’t. What surprising mishap turned an ordinary moment into a memorable fail?

media:content.media:title: What Could Go Wrong?
media:content.media:description: Everything seemed simple—until it wasn’t. What surprising mishap turned an ordinary moment into a memorable fail?

item.title: Lifestyle
item.description: From trapping to the outdoor lifestyle, this clip dives into the rugged side of living free. What makes this lifestyle so addictive and unforgettable?

media:content.media:title: Lifestyle
media:content.media:description: From trapping to the outdoor lifestyle, this clip dives into the rugged side of living free. What makes this lifestyle so addictive and unforgettable?

item.title: We Challenged Kendall Gray to a Fishing Contest!

item.title: Teaching the Art of Grunt Worming
item.description: Learn the old‑school technique of grunt worming, passed down through generations. How does this unusual skill actually work?

media:content.media:title: Teaching the Art of Grunt Worming
media:content.media:description: Learn the old‑school technique of grunt worming, passed down through generations. How does this unusual skill actually work?

item.title: Mowing the Lawn Is Hard!
item.description: Sometimes even the simplest chores turn into a challenge. What makes mowing the lawn such a struggle here?

media:content.media:title: Mowing the Lawn Is Hard!
media:content.media:description: Sometimes even the simplest chores turn into a challenge. What makes mowing the lawn such a struggle here?

item.title: How Bulletproof is Stretch Armstrong?
item.description: Stretch Armstrong faces the ultimate durability test. Just how tough is this childhood icon when pushed to the limit?

media:content.media:title: How Bulletproof is Stretch Armstrong?
media:content.media:description: Stretch Armstrong faces the ultimate durability test. Just how tough is this childhood icon when pushed to the limit?

item.title: One of the Last Old‑School Sawmills
item.description: We visited one of the last old‑school sawmills still running today. What makes this place a living piece of history?

media:content.media:title: One of the Last Old‑School Sawmills
media:content.media:description: We visited one of the last old‑school sawmills still running today. What makes this place a living piece of history?
